definition:
ἐξουσιάζω
 (ἐξουσία) [in LXX (frequently in Ec) chiefly for שָׁלַט ;] 
  1. to exercise authority (Arist.). 
   2. Trans., to exercise authority over: with genitive of person(s), Luk.22:25; with genitive of thing(s), 1Co.7:4; pass., to be held under authority (see Lft., Notes, 214): before ὑπό, 1Co.6:12.†
 (AS)
